violations.text: Breakfast unit was observed held at 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Ham, Cheese, and sausage were observed at 46DF. Voluntarily disposed of Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of pasta salad. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer) observed with food residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Staff washed, rinsed, and sanitized the can opener and slicer during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2023

The walls in the Starbuck's 3 bay sink area and hand-washing sink area are constructed of sheetrock. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. -Walls shall be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
